summary: A 4-4-2 / 4-2-3-1 built on Julio Enciso's creativity and overlapping fullbacks, but with a naive, open rest-defence in a brutal group.
style: 4-4-2 / 4-2-3-1 — wingers' 1v1 creativity (Enciso), fullbacks overlapping in transition, crosses into the box (2nd most in CONMEBOL).

counterReliance.note: Overlapping fullbacks in transition, heavy crossing

strengths: 2nd most crosses into the box in CONMEBOL
Set-play threat (4 goals in qualifying) with big CBs key to the attack

keyPlayers.name: Julio Enciso
keyPlayers.note: Goals & assists, technical & creative, a dribbler and tight-space player

tactics: Overlap the fullbacks, cross to the big centre-backs and lean on Enciso for the special moments. In such a hard group everyone will need their best players to produce.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
